svg.title: I-Wallet actual architecture
svg.desc: Funds flow to Agent Object ID. Contract pulls funds into shared storage. Groth16 proof verifies agent identity before trade execution.
svg.text: 2 — Contract moves funds to shared storage

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the Agent Object ID in I-Wallet and how does it receive funds?')
g.text: no private key, just an ID

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Mandate Object attach to the Agent Object in I-Wallet?')
sendPrompt('What does the I-Wallet Move contract do when pulling funds from the agent object?')
sendPrompt('What is the shared storage object in I-Wallet and who can access it?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI agent generate a Groth16 proof in I-Wallet?')
sendPrompt('What does the Groth16 proof assert in I-Wallet?')
sendPrompt('What does the I-Wallet on-chain verifier contract check?')
sendPrompt('What DEX does I-Wallet execute trades on after verification?')
sendPrompt('How do trade proceeds return to the agent object in I-Wallet?')
